prompt: Use Finder to locate the PDF that setup planted at ~/Desktop/kinbench/366-doc.pdf, open it in Preview (Quick Look or double-click), then capture a screenshot of the screen while Preview is in front and save it to ~/Desktop/kinbench/366-shot.png. Fast path: cerebellum 'multi finder_quicklook ~/Desktop/kinbench/366-doc.pdf ~/Desktop/kinbench/366-shot.png'.
